data.content: Plan review rejected. The proposed search-then-select loop does not satisfy two explicit acceptance criteria: filtering is not real-time because results update only after submitting a query, and the design keeps numeric selection only instead of supporting arrow-key navigation in filtered results. The test strategy is also incomplete for this behavior: sourcing the script in a unit test can cover pure filtering helpers, but it cannot validate /dev/tty incremental input, backspace handling, redraw behavior, or arrow-key selection. Revise the plan to describe an incremental TTY selector/redraw loop, a concrete approach for arrow keys and backspace/clear-to-full-list behavior, and PTY-based coverage for the interactive flow in setup.sh and agent-wizard.sh.
